nasb.text: Or if he consecrates to the Lord a field which he has bought, which is not a part of the field of his own property,

esv.text: If he dedicates to the Lord a field that he has bought, which is not a part of his possession,

cnv.text: 如果人把買來的田地，不是自己承受為業的田地，分別為聖獻給耶和華，

ccb.text: “如果献给耶和华的土地不是自己的产业，而是买来的，
